title: Locally-built (local-operator/<deploy-host>) images stamp SMACKEREL_COMMIT=unknown; no source-SHA provenance
notes: Fix in scripts/commands/config.sh (git-derive SMACKEREL_COMMIT when CI has not exported it). Dockerfile ARG/LABEL/ldflags wiring was already correct; only the local build path fed 'unknown'. Verified statically via a config-generator test (no full self-hosted image build). Requires a rebuild+redeploy for the running images to become self-identifying.
